title: Esho Maa Lakshmi
desc: A tale of Goddess Lakshmi that describes her divine origin, celestial beauty, and role as the bestower of wealth and prosperity in Hindu mythology.

title: Sakaler Sure
desc: Bengali artists love devotional and folk songs. These songs inspire singers and audiences alike. They celebrate culture and faith, creating a shared experience.

title: Manush Keno Beiman
desc: L Chowdhury, a simple villager, who lives with his sister, finds his life turned upside down because of an unexpected accident.

title: Matir Manush
desc: After Meeting With An Accident, Payel Falls In Love With A Man. Things Turn When Her Father Disapproves Of Their Relationship.

title: Satarupa
desc: Dr. Rupa unintentionally causes Shatadal's memory loss, leading him to see her as his only kin. Later, they fall for each other but when his past returns, he forgets her.
